programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #6
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws from Huka Lodge joins Josh Emett and Simon Gault to cook three hearty meat dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Dessert
programme.desc: The top five contestants must replicate a challenging dessert created by award-winning chef, Michael Meredith.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #7
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook their favourite desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Business Class
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants cook Business Class in-flight meals for Jetstar.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #8
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook three different cuts of beef.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Singapore
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants face two epic challenges in the culinary capital of Asia, Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #9
programme.desc: Street food master K.F. Seetoh and Eric Bost, join Ray McVinnie for a Masterclass in Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Cookbook
programme.desc: The three semi-finalists try to impress cookbook queen Annabel Langbein.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #10
programme.desc: In the last Masterclass of the Season, the judge give us a taster of their signature dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Final
programme.desc: The final two contestants take on four challenges in their bid to become New Zealand's next MasterChef.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Auditions: Part 1
programme.desc: MasterChef is back as Australia’s most talented home cooks compete in season 10.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Auditions: Part 2
programme.desc: With 18 aprons given away yesterday, there are just six left.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Individual Challenge: Home Cooked Meal
programme.desc: Our 2018 cooks enter the MasterChef kitchen for their first challenge as the top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: What's in the Fridge
programme.desc: It’s the first elimination of the season!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Mystery Box 1
programme.desc: The surviving contestants are more determined than ever to impress the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Metter, Michelle and Samira wake in the house to find themselves facing a feared Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge 1
programme.desc: The cars roll into the MasterChef garden.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Team Challenge: MCG
programme.desc: Contestants cook outside the MasterChef kitchen for the first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: Source of Inspiration
programme.desc: It’s the elimination after last night’s epic MCG challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Nigella's Mystery Box Challenge & Food Physics Invention Test
programme.desc: It’s the start of a new week in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Nigella's Chocolate Feast
programme.desc: The trio facing today’s feared Pressure Test wake for what may be their last day in the house.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Alanna Sapwell
programme.desc: Today’s challenge will take place over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Brunch Service Challenge
programme.desc: Today contestants cook outside the MasterChef kitchen for the second time.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Seven $1 million cases are in the mix for a male nurse from Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP6
programme.desc: A newly married woman from Kansas City, Kan., plays a game with six $1 million cases.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA (Syndicated Version) - EP83
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA (Syndicated Version) - EP31
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA (Syndicated Version) - EP25
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: A teacher from Pennsylvania returns to finish her game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The game gets hairy for a barber from Ohio, who plays for $2 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP14
programme.desc: A single mother from the Bronx and a woman from Florida vie for the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP15
programme.desc: A woman from Florida continues her quest to score the big prize. Then a Minnesota math teacher hopes it will all add up for a million-dollar win.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - I'm Dancin' Here!
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with new twists and turns!

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - High Value Family
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with life-changing money on the line!

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - There's Snow Place Like Home
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Five Dollar Redemption
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal history collides on stage when Artis Jackson gets the chance to redeem his family’s honor.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Beard Or No Beard
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Happy Howie Days
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's hit game show is back after 10 years with a heart-warming holiday special.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - It Takes Two
programme.desc: Mother, teacher, and former marine Jade Thomas is all about family.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Southern Charm
programme.desc: Witness an ultimate television cliffhanger as Robert Evans fills the stage with southern charm.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Entrepreneur, Ally Teixeira has sweet dreams that will change the face of the ice cream industry forever.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Flying High
programme.desc: Poker player Shireen Mui goes all in against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Small Town, Big Dreams
programme.desc: Loveable Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town, Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - My Big Fat Greek Game Show
programme.desc: George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a plate-breaking and suspense filled game.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Trifle Tasting Elimination Challenge & MasterClass 1
programme.desc: It’s the elimination after yesterday’s epic Brunch Battle

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Gordon's British Box Challenge & Fast Food Invention Test
programme.desc: It’s the start of a new week in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Raviolo of Marron
programme.desc: Michele, Ben and Chloe wake to find themselves today facing a Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Jo Barrett, Gavin Hughes, John Rivera
programme.desc: The winners of the Mystery Box and Invention Test cooking in today’s Immunity Challenge

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Three-Course Dinner Service Challenge
programme.desc: After a massive Immunity Challenge yesterday saw two pins given away.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Matt Abé's Roast Chicken with Summer Vegetables and Green Herb Consommé
programme.desc: Chloe, Kristen, Sarah, Aldo, Jo, Ben, Loki, Samira and Gina wake for what may be their last day in the house.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Quiche Lorraine
programme.desc: Wade, Emma and Filippo had to recreate Gary's Quiche Lorraine without the aid of a recipe.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Hamish Ingham
programme.desc: Audra, winner of the Mega Mystery Box Challenge is determined to win an immunity pin

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Hindu Wedding
programme.desc: Two teams face their toughest challenge yet and cater for a Sri-Lankan Hindu wedding with a vegetarian menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Cake
programme.desc: The red team enjoy a special masterclass courtesy of Giovanni Pilu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 7
programme.desc: In a French food-themed masterclass, Gary cooks a beautiful French onion soup.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Soup & Invention Test - Dude Food
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box Challenge contestants are given 60 minutes to make a soup of their choice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Christine Manfield
programme.desc: Christine Manfield lifts the cloche on a highly complex smoked river trout.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Premiere
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia returns with the best group of home cooks the competition has ever seen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 1
programme.desc: The first Masterclass of Season 3 sees Danielle, Jay, Cleo & Seamus visiting Maggie Beer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - 2nd Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: In the second judges' auditions our amateur cooks are given one hour to cook their best dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Final Round Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: With the Final Round of the Judge's Audition comes the First Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - First Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: 2015's Masterchef, Billie McKay, knows exactly what this crop of aspirants are going through.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 1
programme.desc: The first Masterclass of Season 3 sees Danielle, Jay, Cleo & Seamus visiting Maggie Beer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - 2nd Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: In the second judges' auditions our amateur cooks are given one hour to cook their best dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Final Round Judges' Auditions
programme.desc: With the Final Round of the Judge's Audition comes the First Pressure Test.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP2

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: The Motor City, Detroit, brings one-of-a-kind father of five sons, John West, to the stage.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Philadelphia’s Missy Silverman shakes up the stage with her boundless energy.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Sony's Choice
programme.desc: One of Deal or No Deal’s biggest fans, Sony Avalos is clear she knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Real life Las Vegas hero, Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cheering For A Lucky Strike
programme.desc: Cheerleader Tex Iniguez shakes her pom poms past six figures in hopes of beating The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Lane
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama - bowling champion Kyera presses on in her battle against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Mile-High Millionaire
programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Bingo To A Million
programme.desc: Playing for his Golden Girls-style dream home, former Bingo caller Tony Oriente.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Musical
programme.desc: Business owner, La’Sherrie Butler Hogan showstops the stage, and the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Ironman
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero seeks to secure his children's future.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Monopoly Money
programme.desc: Real estate agent, Toni Miller is used to buying and selling hot properties.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - The Champ Vs. The Banker
programme.desc: Michael Chandler is used to taking some hits and putting up a good fight – and tonight is no different.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Wall Street Warrior
programme.desc: Lisa Glicksman knows exactly what kind of fight is needed to beat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Magic Touch
programme.desc: In another incredible combo game of Deal or No Deal, two new contestants fill the studio with magical moments.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Roller Coaster In Motion
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal comes to life with two Orlando contestants taking over.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Martinis for a Million
programme.desc: Laura Siano plans to save, spend and share; this game comes with martinis and male models.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Vision Quest
programme.desc: South Dakota’s Jade Delaney believes in the power of positive thinking and she has a vision board to prove it.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Looking For Luck (In All The Right Cases)
programme.desc: Nurse Andrew Shelton declares himself the unluckiest person ever to combat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: A mom-to-be tries to find one of five million-dollar cases, and surprises her husband.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP3
programme.desc: NASCAR's Jimmie Johnson drops by to meet a player from Rhode Island.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: The Banker offers a Detroit video-game fan the chance to become a game character.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: A pharmacy technician competes.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP6
programme.desc: A newly married woman from Kansas City, Kan., plays a game with six $1 million cases.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Seven $1 million cases are in the mix for a male nurse from Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP8
programme.desc: Eight $1 million cases are added to a Minnesota woman's game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP9
programme.desc: Nine $1 million cases are on the line for a New Jersey woman's game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP10
programme.desc: A hot-dog merchant from Nevada and a teacher from Pennsylvania compete for the top prize.
